name: Lassis Inn

seo.title: Lassis Inn — Legendary Catfish Restaurant in Little Rock | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: Lassis Inn is one of Little Rock's most legendary restaurants — a modest South Main catfish house operating since 1905, serving the city's best fried catfish from a building that's barely changed.

description: Lassis Inn has been serving fried catfish from a small building south of the South Main district since 1905, making it one of the oldest continuously operating restaurants in Arkansas. The building and the operation are both modest: a few tables, counter service, paper plates, and catfish that's been done the same way for over a century. The catfish is whole, bone-in, perfectly cornmeal-crusted, and fried in a cast iron tradition that no amount of menu engineering or atmosphere investment can replicate. Sides are simple: coleslaw, white bread, hot sauce. The line on Fridays reflects the reputation — get there before noon. Cash is preferred. This is a Little Rock essential.
